---
title: "Open Government Data, OpenDataZurich"
date: "2026-04-05"
output: html_document
---

## Dataset: Mahnwachen

Anzahl der bewilligten Mahnwachen.


nan

[Direct link by **OpenDataZurich** for dataset](https://data.stadt-zuerich.ch/dataset/sid_stapo_sicherheitsbericht_mahnwachen_od101c)

Auto generated R starter code for data set sid_stapo_sicherheitsbericht_mahnwachen_od101c.

## Metadata

- **Publisher** `Stadtpolizei Zürich, Sicherheitsdepartement`
- **Maintainer** `Open Data Zürich`
- **Maintainer_email** `opendata@zuerich.ch`
- **Keywords** `Kri­mi­na­li­tät`
- **Tags** `['kriminalitaet', 'sachdaten', 'sasa', 'stadtpolizei', 'tabelle', 'zeitreihe']`
- **Metadata_created** `2026-03-31T04:30:09.441674`
- **Metadata_modified** `2026-04-04T10:30:21.319465`


# Load packages

```{r}
library(skimr)
library(tidyverse)
```

# Load the data

```{r}
url <- "https://data.stadt-zuerich.ch/dataset/sid_stapo_sicherheitsbericht_mahnwachen_od101c/download/RCH101OD101C.csv"
if (str_detect(url, ".csv")) {
    df <- readr::read_csv(url)
} else if (str_detect(url, ".parquet")) {
    df <- arrow::read_parquet(url)
} else {
    print("File format not recognised!")
}
```

# Analyze the data

look at the data
```{r}
head(df)
```

```{r}
glimpse(df)
```

```{r}
skim(df)
```

# Continue your code here...

```{r}

```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Contact

opendata@zuerich.ch
